scripts.test: cargo test --workspace --lib --tests --examples --locked && cargo test -p fastmulp-core --doc --locked && cargo test -p fastmulp-wasm --doc --locked
scripts.ci:local: pnpm fmt:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test && cargo check -p fastmulp-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --locked
scripts.package:core: cargo package -p fastmulp-core --locked --allow-dirty --list && cargo publish -p fastmulp-core --locked --allow-dirty --dry-run
